sourcesContent:
import { Person, PermIdentity, LocalShippingOutlined, CalendarToday, Place, MailOutline, } from "@material-ui/icons"; import { Link, useLocation } from "react-router-dom"; import { useSelector, useDispatch } from 'react-redux'; import "./order.css"; import {format} from 'timeago.js'; import { useState } from "react"; import { Dialog, DialogTitle, DialogActions, Button } from '@material-ui/core'; import { updateOrder } from "../../redux/apiCalls"; const Order = () => { const location = useLocation(); const orderId = location.pathname.split("/")[2]; const dispatch = useDispatch(); const order = useSelector((state) => state.order.orders.find(order => order._id === orderId) ); const [ status, setStatus ] = useState(''); const handleUpdateOrder = (e) => { setStatus(e.target.value) }; const handleClick = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); const orderToUpdate = { ...order.products, ...inputs }; updateOrder(orderId, orderToUpdate, dispatch) } return (

Order ID {order._id}

Personal Information

User ID:

{order.userId}

User Email:

{order.email}

Order Status:

Created At:

{format(order.createdAt)}

Updated At:

{format(order.updatedAt)}

Address

Street:

{order.address?.line1}

{order.address?.line2}

City:

{order.address?.city}

State:

{order.address?.state}

Post Code:

{order.address?.postal_code}

Products

{order.products.map((product) => ( ))}
Product ID Product Title Color Quantity Price for 100 kg Price for Product
{product.productId} {product.title} {product.color} {product.quantity} {product.price} {product.quantity * product.price} UAH

Total Amount: {order.amount} UAH

); }; export default Order;
